title: NUWAB Mini Bike Pump, 9.4" Hand Bicycle Pump, Quick Balloon Pump, Portable Multi-purpose Pump,Suitable for All Bikes and Balls, Swimming Rings, Come with Ball Needles, Nozzles and Converters
features: 1. WIDE COMPATIBILITY: This is 9.4inch portable bike pump that will help you when you need it and is a practical tool for sports enthusiasts. It is suitable for Shrader, Presta and meets the needs of different valves for bike. The Max pressure of the bike pump is 100PSI, which can be inflated for bikes, electric vehicles, motorcycles. Deliver 4 metal ball needles and 4 conical nozzles for inflating balls, swimming rings and inflatable toys.

2. LIGHTWEIGHT: The mini bike pump is specially designed for easy portability, weighing is only 0.2lb and 9.4in. It comes with a bracket that mounts where a bottle cage would mount on a bike. The bracket is universal and fits most bikes. Bike pump can also be put in a backpack, which is very convenient to carry out.

3. QUALITY MATERIAL: Bike pump is mainly made of high quality plastic that won't rust. The body of the bike pump is thick and strong without deformation. Anti-slip handle design, the hand is not easy to fall off when inflating, and feel comfortable.

4. VALVE: Bike pump also works with both Presta and Schrader valves. The original can be directly applied to Schrader, change the direction of the parts inside the valve, can be applied to Presta. If you think that replacing the parts is a tedious job, you can add metal converter on the original valve and suitable for Presta. The original valve is directly added with ball needle or conical nozzle, which can be inflated for balls or balloons, swimming rings, etc.

5. PACKAGE: The package including 1PCS bike pump, 1PCS carry bag, 2PCS metal converter, 2PCS short conical nozzles, 2PCS long conical nozzles and 4PCS metal ball needles. If you have any questions about our products, please contact with us at any time.
description: Product Description NUWAB Mini Bike Pump WIDE COMPATIBILITY Bike pump works with both Presta and Schrader valves. It is Suitable for All Bikes and Balls, Swimming Rings. LIGHT AND PORTABLE Bike pump weighing is only 0.2lb and 9.4in. It's small and light enough to carry around and ride without interference. BIKE PUMP SPECIFICATIONS Material: Plastics Weight: 0.2lb Color: Black Length: 9.4inches
